593:   const loadPublishedProducts = async () => {
594:     try {
595:       const { data, error } = await supabase
596:         .from('website_pooja_products')
597:         .select('*')
598:         .eq('is_published', true)
599:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
600: 
601:       if (error) throw error;
602:       if (data) {
603:         const mappedData: Product[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
604:           id: item.id,
605:           name: item.name,
606:           description: item.description,
607:           price: typeof item.price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.price) : item.price,
608:           originalPrice: item.original_price ? (typeof item.original_price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.original_price) : item.original_price) : undefined,
609:           rating: typeof item.rating === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.rating) : (item.rating || 5.0),
610:           reviewsCount: item.reviews_count || 0,
611:           image: item.image || '📿',
612:           category: item.category,
613:           inStock: item.in_stock ?? true,
614:           benefits: item.benefits || [],
615:           popularity: item.popularity || 80,
616:           spiritualType: item.spiritual_type || 'Rituals',
617:           // custom fields to keep compatibility with PoojaProduct:
618:           sanskritName: item.sanskrit_name,
619:           shortName: item.short_name,
620:           slug: item.slug,
621:           subtitle: item.subtitle,
622:           shortDescription: item.short_description,
623:           spiritualSignificance: item.spiritual_significance,
624:           material: item.material,
625:           weight: item.weight,
626:           dimensions: item.dimensions,
627:           origin: item.origin,
628:           customIcons: item.custom_icons || {},
629:           ritualsIncluded: item.rituals_included || [],
630:           samagriList: item.samagri_list || [],
631:           priestDetails: item.priest_details || { name: '', experience: '', bio: '', qualification: '' },
632:           duration: item.duration,
633:           idealOccasions: item.ideal_occasions || [],
634:           templeAssociation: item.temple_association,
635:           whoShouldPerform: item.who_should_perform,
636:           offers: item.offers || [],
637:           badges: item.badges || [],
638:           testimonials: item.testimonials || [],
639:           faqs: item.faqs || [],
640:           bookingInstructions: item.booking_instructions,
